title: alive-demo Stage 0 spine
description: Schema descriptor for the spine.json document Stage 0 of the /alive:demo generation pipeline emits. Stage 0 enforces this contract via a stdlib-only hand-rolled validator in `plugins/alive/skills/demo/stages/stage0.py:preflight_spine` (see the epic spec § 'Why stdlib-only validation' — the plan's original `Draft202012Validator` reference is replaced because vendoring jsonschema would pull a Rust extension dep that violates the plugin's stdlib-only posture). This file is a machine-readable descriptor for downstream consumers (test harnesses, future tooling) and is kept in sync with the human-readable spec at spine.schema.md and the runtime checks in preflight_spine. Constraints that JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 cannot natively express (slug uniqueness across or within rosters) are encoded as `x-alive-uniqueSlugAcross` / `x-alive-uniqueSlugPerParent` extension annotations on the relevant array properties; downstream tooling that wants full parity with Stage 0 must apply both the standard schema rules AND those annotations. Coherence invariants (cross-references, walnut-must-have-bundle, anchor-date-in-timespan) are deferred to plugins/alive/skills/demo/validate.py (fn-2-2zz.10) and are NOT encoded here.

walnut_roster.$comment: Stage 0 preflight rejects duplicate slug values across the walnut_roster (see preflight_spine in plugins/alive/skills/demo/stages/stage0.py). Standard JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 has no native uniqueness-on-a-keyed-field constraint, so this is encoded as the x-alive-uniqueSlugAcross extension annotation.

people_roster.$comment: Stage 0 preflight rejects duplicate slug values across the people_roster.

bundle_distribution.$comment: Stage 0 preflight rejects duplicate (walnut_slug, slug) pairs in bundle_distribution; the same bundle slug under different walnut_slugs is allowed.

time_span.$comment: Stage 0 preflight enforces time_span.start <= time_span.end (lexicographic comparison on the strict YYYY-MM-DD string is equivalent to date comparison). JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 cannot natively express cross-property comparisons; encoded as the x-alive-rangeOrder extension annotation.

anchor_moments.$comment: Stage 0 preflight rejects duplicate slug values across anchor_moments.
